The Tent of Tip Tham Tâm
"Mom, look at my tent." "Oh, it looks so cool."
"Where are you taking your coloring stuffs to, Tip?" "Into my tent."
"It’s so fun to do coloring in my tent, Mom." "I see."
"Tip, it’s time for your milk." "I’ll drink it in my tent."
Gulp gulp…"The milk tastes yummier in my tent, Mom."
"Tip, it’s bedtime now." "I’m sleeping in my tent tonight, Mom."
"OK, so good night. I’m going to bed now."
"Mom, Dad, I’m bringing my tent with me…"
"Can I sleep in your tent?" "Sure, Daddy."
"Well… It's best to sleep in my tent with Mom and Dad."
